payload.answer: The prior open/planned state is superseded for the MVP scope: the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. This does not necessarily imply the entire Brain Slack agent project is fully complete beyond the MVP.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same Brain Slack agent project, scoped specifically to its MVP milestone.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.

details: Committed new implemented status for the Brain Slack agent MVP.
Preserved ambiguity between MVP completion and full project completion.
Superseded the prior planned/open status for the MVP scope.
